brainstorming.scope: use its clarifying-question discipline to shape the draft's Open questions (recommended answers, YAGNI, 2-3 approaches); skip its spec-doc write/commit flow and approval gate because the orchestrator owns the chat iteration and the gate; write 2-design.md only

writing-plans.scope: use its planning discipline: concrete files, test strategy, no placeholders; skip docs/plans file-save behavior and execution handoff; write 2-design.md only

feature-dev.scope: implement only against the approved 2-design.md; skip feature-dev discovery, clarifying-question, and architecture phases; may dispatch devforge-code-explorer or devforge-code-architect for grounding only

staff-review.scope: apply to the pasted diff; focus on correctness, edge cases, and test coverage; skip its argument parsing and gh/PR flows

thermonuclear.scope: follow as instruction text, not as an invoked skill; apply maintainability standards to the pasted diff: 1k-line file ceiling, no spaghetti branching, and code-judo simplification; map presumptive blockers to blocker or major

code-review.scope: keep the confidence-score method (single-context if subagents are unavailable), but review the pasted diff plus the working tree instead of `gh pr diff`; skip PR eligibility checks and PR comments; report only findings with score >= 80
